content:
God of Slaughter

Chapter 1578: Head to the Holy Land

Translator:

Sigma_

Editor:

SSins

The eternal sealed area created by Shi Yan and Montecie, Volcano Cloud Sea.

Many warriors were scattered outside the amber sealed area. Some were discharging dregs in their bodies while others were trying to learn the power Upanishads. Also, there were visitors traveling to this place just to watch the experts of the four clans who were sealed like fossils inside the amber.

This place had become a wonder of the Sea Domain of Nihility, a miracle that attracted many experts to come and behold!

Inside that eternal seal, Beverly was beautiful with her snake body. She was really outstanding in the middle of tens of thousands other warriors. People came, watching and pointing at her. “She’s Beverly, one of the Ten Great Territory Ancestors. She was the master of the Ancient Demon Clan. Too bad that she has been sealed here for more than thirty years.”

This land could seal one of the Ten Great Territory Ancestors; of course, it attracted a lot of eyes. Except for that, this place had more magical features...

At first, when someone cultivated outside, they found that time seemed to go slower. Although they felt that they had been there and cultivated for one hundred years, only a little more than ten years passed in reality.

Around the eternal seal area, time flew disorderly and it seemed to be slightly held.

To some people that didn’t have long life spans, this place was the best place to cultivate. They could spend a dozen years to exchange for one hundred years of accumulating energy and comprehending their realm. What was better than this?

That’s why many warriors around couldn’t help but gather around the outer edge of this sealed area to cultivate. It was how they saved their time.

The seal was so vast and the peripheral area seemed almost endless. Thus, even if tens of thousands of warriors were cultivating here at the same time, they wouldn’t disturb each other.

Especially for the warriors cultivating Time and Space power Upanishads, they didn’t mind the long distance to come to this place. They had crossed many territories to come here as if it was the best pilgrimage in their lives.

To them, this place was a real holy land!

This magical land was created by the power of Time and Space and it casted an eternal seal. It could guide them and provide them with a place to observe and learn the mysteries of Time and Space power Upanishads.

Many men and women cultivating Space and Time power Upanishads came as they knew Shi Yan and Montecie had magically cast this wonder by combining their power Upanishads. During their cultivation, many of them had become husbands and wives. It had somehow become a romantic legend.

——————————-

In a remote corner, a man shrouded in a jet black robe was standing. He hovered like a ghost. The hood of his robe concealed his face. From a distance, he was watching the sealed area. Observing Beverly for a while, he stooped and sighed.

After a long time, another figure came. He looked imposing with thick demon Qi meandering around his body, which also hid his appearance.

He came to the ghost in a black robe and hissed, “Brother Serene Prison.”

The thick demon Qi dispersed and it revealed Rupert’s handsome but severe face. He looked at Beverly, his face complicated.

The man put back the hood on his head. He was Serene Prison. Deep in his dark eyes, a flame of anger burned. “We’ve been fighting for thirty years. We are worn out. After the Ancient Demon Clan lost Beverly, it was divided. They don’t have the power to resist anymore. Our two clans have been defeated continuously. We’re dispirited...”

“All is because of this seal. It confines our elite force. If not, how could we be so pathetic like this?” Rupert said with a dark face.

“I’ve been here for three years and I’ve tried so many ways. I even sent my soul to the seal...”

Serene Prison wore an ashen face as he shook his head and said desperately, “It’s so evil. That seal prevents even the soul. My Soul Consciousness couldn’t intrude. Sigh, if we can’t break this seal, our elite force can’t get out. We will have to live like turtles. We won’t dare to fight Han Tian and Hiro.”

“They’d killed millions of our warriors in our homelands. They plundered all the properties we accumulated for tens of thousands of years!” Ruper’s eyes had a spooky flame of wrath as he spoke through his gritted teeth. “I must take revenge on them! The glory of our Black Demon Clan, the faith that we have held high for tens of thousands of years, can’t be erased in my hands!”

“The Soul Clan will not decline in my hands, either!” Serene Prison hissed.

Slosh! Slosh! Slosh!

Sloshing water arose when a black stream zoomed in from a far distance. A figure slowly materialized in the black water. It was Yuan Zu in his human form. He came to Serene Prison and Rupert, and said, “Don’t worry. Your clans won’t decline. As long as you can reach Third Sky of Territory Ancestor Realm, we can overturn everything in just a blink of an eye!”

“... Third Sky of Territory Ancestor Realm? Sigh, that’s easier said than done,” Serene Prison wore a bitter face.

“Your chance is right in front of you. I have news from Sauron. He said that the Absolute Beginning Gateway is changing more. It’s about to open. During our Absolute Beginning Era, it never had any commotion. It holds the last riddle of earth and heaven. We tried everything but we couldn’t open it that year. But now, it’s obvious that the gateway is about to open...”

Rupert and Serene Prison’s eyes brightened when they heard that.

Belonging to the most prominent group in this universe, they had chances to talk to Sauron. Of course, they knew the meaning of the Absolute Beginning Gateway. Actually, if the seven clans didn’t have that war, they would have been preparing to enter that door.

“The Absolute Beginning Gateway can change everything. It can reverse your bad situations!” Seeing that they were moved, Yuan Zu tried to entice them. “Your remaining fellows are safe now. I’ve hidden them away. Come with me to the Absolute Beginning Gateway to slaughter Shi Yan’s team. As long as we win the battle at the Absolute Beginning Gateway, you guys can determine the future of this universe!”

“What does Sauron think?” Rupert asked all of a sudden.

Serene Prison also pulled a stern face. “Yeah, what is his attitude?”

“I’m not sure, actually. Anyway, I think that because Sauron planned this for thousands of years, he must have accurate calculations.” Yuan Zu stooped to watch the sea of clouds under his feet. “I always feel that the chaos in our universe is instigated by Sauron. Although this man is from the Human Clan, he’s very smart. I can say that he’s the strongest expert of this era. I can’t see him through. He has his conspiracy, but no one can scheme the Absolute Beginning Gateway! As long as you agree to help me, I’m sure your Soul Clan and Black Demon Clan will become the strongest clan in this world in the future!”

“Who will come to the Absolute Beginning Gateway besides us?” asked Serene Prison.

“Of course, Edgar and the Devouring Clan will join this. Recently, Devour has created so many calamities in Empty Land and the Sea of Annihilation to recover his power. He’s preparing to go to the Absolute Beginning Gateway. They will be a part of this.” Yuan Zu’s eyes flared with evil lights. “Han Tian, Montecie, Hiro, Shi Yan, and ZY will form a party. They’re the key. Since Shi Yan has the Power Upanishad Symbol Tower, Sauron will try every means he has to lure him there...”

Pausing for a while, Yuan Zu said, “Sauron and Zhen Ru have joined hands discreetly. This time, after Myriad Shape Tribe got damaged badly, they’ve retreated. Zhen Ru, of course, is on Sauron’s side. As the one who planned all of these, Sauron is guarding the Absolute Beginning Gateway. They are the most formidable party because Sauron knows a lot of things about the Absolute Beginning Gateway.”

“And who else?” asked Rupert.

Yuan Zu quieted down. After a long time, he wore a respectful face and said, “I’m sure Desolate won’t miss it. That year, he even used his intimidating power to attack the Absolute Beginning Gateway directly! If he hadn’t failed and got hurt severely, Hui and Devour couldn’t have dismembered him and sent him into a coma like that.”

“Is Desolate that fierce?” Serene Prison was frightened.

Yuan Zu pulled a sour face and sighed, “He can be much more terrifying than you think. Each era has its peerless warrior. Sauron of your era is a peak existence. He’s invincible. In my time, Desolate was the sort of existence like Sauron... He’s an invincible legend. All the creatures in my time had to live in his shadow...”

“If we let him recover fully, I don’t know who can fight him. At that time, he’ll be the biggest variable. Sigh, even though I know he was dormant in Desolate Territory, I didn’t dare to get there and fuse with him...”

Rupert and Serene Prison exchanged looks. They understood that Yuan Zu had an instinctive fear for Desolate, which made their hearts heavier because they hadn’t thought about Desolate much.

“If we can save Beverly, we will have a greater chance. Do you have any strategy?” Serene Prison looked at Yuan Zu.

“Before you came, I’ve tried many times. It would be a miracle if we break this Time and Space Seal,” Yuan Zu shook his head reluctantly, “If I could, I would have done it already. We should have seized time when we could to prepare for the battle at the Absolute Beginning Gateway.”

“What do we need to prepare?” Serene Prison was surprised.

“In the Absolute Beginning Era, I didn’t join the last battle. I was hiding at that time. It’s the only Absolute Beginning land that has been preserved perfectly until now! I’ve hidden it. No one knows where it is. It still has some good things from the Absolute Beginning Era that you can use to enhance your power,” smiled Yuan Zu.

Serene Prison’s and Rupert’s eyes brightened.

“Follow me! Before Sauron contacts me, we must accumulate energy for the last battle!” Yuan Zu stepped on the black river and headed towards the dark void. “You guys shouldn’t think too much about your clan in a harsh condition. You should know this: As soon as we can harvest something in the Absolute Beginning Gateway, it will be much more than what we used to have!”
